propositions: Slow tests are currently invisible in CI because there is no ongoing per-test performance signal.
Add --durations=25 to the default-suite pytest invocation so every gate run prints its 25 slowest tests.
Optionally add a scheduled/post-merge step that runs pytest --store-durations to persist a .test_durations JSON map as an artifact for future sharding via pytest-split.
The .test_durations file must be gitignored or artifact-only so it never leaks into the checkout or trips the repo-leak guard.
--durations must remain compatible with -q, coverage, and xdist.
